mapper.insert:
insert into app.advisor_product_draft_component (draft_id, fund_id, weight) values
(#{item.draftId}, #{item.fundId}, #{item.weight})
mapper.select: select dc.fund_id as fundId, f.fund_code as fundCode, f.fund_name as fundName, f.fund_type as fundType, f.risk_level as riskLevel, f.company_name as companyName, dc.weight as weight from app.advisor_product_draft_component dc inner join app.fund_info f on f.id = dc.fund_id where dc.draft_id = #{draftId} order by dc.id asc
